zh.Gwyr, Glamorgan, Wales: 英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Leuan ap Eynon於大約1355年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根爾時，他的父親Eynon ap Hywel37歲，母親Mrs. ap HOWELL Eynon35歲。他於大約1379年與Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和9個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Leuan ap Eynon于大约1355年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根爾时，他的父亲Eynon ap Hywel37岁，母亲Mrs. ap HOWELL Eynon35岁。他于大约1379年与Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和9个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Eynon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from Enniaun, an old Welsh personal name ultimately derived from Late Latin Annianus, but also associated with Welsh einion ‘anvil’, taken as implying stability and fortitude. See also Beynon and compare Onion .

variants.name: Hennion
meanings: Welsh: from a hypercorrected form of the Welsh personal name Ennion, see Eynon .
Flemish and French (mainly Nord): from a pet form of the personal name Henri or Jehen (see Jean ).

variants.name: Bennion
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Einion, ap Eynon ‘son of Einion’ (see Eynon ).

variants.name: Binion
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Einion, ap Eynon ‘son of Einion’. See Eynon and compare Bennion . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Kenyon
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place near Warrington, which is of uncertain etymology. There was formerly an ancient burial mound there and Ekwall has speculated that the name is a shortened form of a British name composed of the elements crūc ‘mound’ + a personal name cognate with Welsh Einion (see Eynon ).

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinín ‘son of Coinín’, a byname based on a diminutive of cano ‘wolf’, also Anglicized as Canning and Cunneen . The similarity to the borrowed word coinín ‘coney, rabbit’ has sometimes caused this name to be Anglicized as Rabbitt .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhinghin, ‘son of Finghen’, a personal name meaning ‘fair-born’.

nameMeanings.name: Leuan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Leuan ap Eynon was born about 1355, in Gwyr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Eynon ap Hywel, was 37 and his mother, Mrs. ap HOWELL Eynon, was 35. He married Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan about 1379, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 9 daughters.

fr.Gwyr, Glamorgan, Wales: Gwyr, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Leuan ap Eynon est né environ 1355, à Gwyr, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Eynon ap Hywel, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mrs. ap HOWELL Eynon, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan environ 1379, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 9 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Leuan ap Eynon um 1355 in Gwyr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eynon ap Hywel 37 und seine Mutter Mrs. ap HOWELL Eynon 35. Er hat um 1379 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 9 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Leuan ap Eynon è nato il circa 1355 nel Gwyr, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Eynon ap Hywel, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. ap HOWELL Eynon, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan circa 1379, nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 9 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Leuan ap Eynonが約1355年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガングウイルで生まれた時，父Eynon ap Hywelは37歳，母Mrs. ap HOWELL Eynonは35歳であった。約1379年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンでTanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Leuan ap Eynon(이)가 대략 1355년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 그w이르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eynon ap Hywel(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. ap HOWELL Eynon(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1379년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Leuan ap Eynon nasceu aproximadamente 1355, em Gwyr, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Eynon ap Hywel, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. ap HOWELL Eynon, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan aproximadamente 1379, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 9 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Leuan ap Eynon родился около 1355 г. в местности гвир, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Eynon ap Hywel было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. ap HOWELL Eynon, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan около 1379 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 9 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Leuan ap Eynon nació aproximadamente 1355, en Gwyr, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Eynon ap Hywel, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mrs. ap HOWELL Eynon, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan aproximadamente 1379, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 9 hijas.
